name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-34
title: tdd-drift-check.py guards on file executability that may be irrelevant
description: tdd-drift-check.py run_tests_get_rc requires that runner is executable (os.access X_OK). It then invokes the runner via sys.executable, ignoring the +x bit. The check is wrong: 'python3 path/to/run.py' works regardless of whether run.py has +x set. Removing the +x guard would let drift-check work in worktrees where +x bits aren't preserved. Alternatively justify the guard in spec.
